---
title: "Example 5 Experiment (NN + Global Shapley)"
output: pdf_document
---

This Rmd reproduces Example 5:
- Two predictors are generated along the line x1 = x2 in [0,1], then perturbed by iid N(0, 0.05^2) noise.
- True response: f_true(x) = x1 + x2^2 with iid error variance 0.1^2.
- We tune a small neural net via K-fold CV to maximize R^2.
- Then run 100 replicates and compute global Shapley importances for X1 and X2.

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Install/load required packages
pkgs <- c("iml", "nnet", "rsample", "dplyr", "purrr")
to_install <- pkgs[!pkgs %in% rownames(installed.packages())]
if (length(to_install) > 0) install.packages(to_install)

library(iml)
library(nnet)
library(rsample)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)

set.seed(123)
```

```{r}
dgp <- function(n) {
  t <- runif(n, 0, 1)
  x1 <- t + rnorm(n, mean = 0, sd = 0.05)
  x2 <- t + rnorm(n, mean = 0, sd = 0.05)
  y <- x1 + x2^2 + rnorm(n, mean = 0, sd = 0.1)
  X <- data.frame(X1 = x1, X2 = x2)
  list(X = X, y = y)
}
```

```{r}
r2_score <- function(y_true, y_pred) {
  ss_res <- sum((y_true - y_pred)^2)
  ss_tot <- sum((y_true - mean(y_true))^2)
  1 - ss_res / ss_tot
}
```

```{r}
train_nn <- function(X, y, params) {
  # center/scale based on training data
  x_means <- sapply(X, mean)
  x_sds   <- sapply(X, sd)
  Xs <- as.data.frame(scale(X, center = x_means, scale = x_sds))

  pars <- modifyList(
    list(size = 5, decay = 0, maxit = 500, linout = TRUE, trace = FALSE),
    params
  )

  model <- nnet::nnet(
    x = Xs, y = y,
    size   = pars$size,
    decay  = pars$decay,
    maxit  = pars$maxit,
    linout = pars$linout,
    trace  = pars$trace
  )

  list(
    model = model,
    x_means = x_means,
    x_sds = x_sds
  )
}

# Predict wrapper for trained object returned by train_nn
predict_nn <- function(fit, newdata) {
  Xs_new <- as.data.frame(scale(newdata, center = fit$x_means, scale = fit$x_sds))
  as.numeric(predict(fit$model, Xs_new))
}
```

```{r}
# 4) Hyperparameter tuning via K-fold CV
tune_nn <- function(X, y, K = 5, seed = 123) {
  set.seed(seed)
  folds <- rsample::vfold_cv(data.frame(X, y = y), v = K)

  grid <- expand.grid(
    size  = c(1, 3, 5, 10, 20, 40),
    decay = c(0, 1e-4, 1e-3, 1e-2),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

  cv_results <- purrr::pmap_dfr(grid, function(size, decay) {
    r2s <- purrr::map_dbl(folds$splits, function(sp) {
      train_df <- rsample::analysis(sp)
      test_df  <- rsample::assessment(sp)

      fit <- train_nn(
        X = train_df[, c("X1", "X2")],
        y = train_df$y,
        params = list(size = size, decay = decay, maxit = 1000)
      )
      preds <- predict_nn(fit, test_df[, c("X1", "X2")])
      r2_score(test_df$y, preds)
    })

    data.frame(size = size, decay = decay, mean_r2 = mean(r2s), sd_r2 = sd(r2s))
  })

  best <- cv_results %>% arrange(desc(mean_r2)) %>% slice(1)
  best_params <- list(size = best$size, decay = best$decay, maxit = 1500)
  
  # Fit on full data with best params
  best_fit <- train_nn(X, y, best_params)
  full_r2 <- r2_score(y, predict_nn(best_fit, X))
  
  cat("Best params:\n")
  print(best_params)
  cat(sprintf("\nTraining R^2 with best params: %.4f\n", full_r2))
  cat("Theoretical optimum is ~0.972; CV mean should be close.\n")
  
  list(
    best_params = best_params,
    cv_table = cv_results,
    best_fit = best_fit,
    train_r2 = full_r2
  )
}
```

```{r}
experiment_5 <- function(n = 200, reps = 100, K = 5, shapley_sample_size = 100, seed = 123) {
  set.seed(seed)

  # a) Tune on a single dataset
  dat0 <- dgp(n)
  tune_out <- tune_nn(dat0$X, dat0$y, K = K, seed = seed)
  best_params <- tune_out$best_params

  # storage for global Shapley importances
  shap_mat_sqr <- matrix(NA_real_, nrow = reps, ncol = 2)
  shap_mat_abs <- matrix(NA_real_, nrow = reps, ncol = 2)
  colnames(shap_mat_sqr) <- c("X1", "X2")
  colnames(shap_mat_abs) <- c("X1", "X2")
  
  t0 <- Sys.time()

  for (r in seq_len(reps)) {
    dat <- dgp(n)
    fit <- train_nn(dat$X, dat$y, best_params)
    
    # iml Predictor object
    predictor <- iml::Predictor$new(
      model = fit,
      data  = dat$X,
      y     = dat$y,
      predict.function = function(m, newdata) predict_nn(m, newdata)
    )
    
    idx <- sample(seq_len(n), size = min(shapley_sample_size, n))
    
    phis <- purrr::map_dfr(idx, function(i) {
      sh <- iml::Shapley$new(predictor, x.interest = dat$X[i, , drop = FALSE])
      out <- sh$results
      # out has columns: feature, phi, etc.
      out %>% select(feature, phi)
    })
    
    glob_sqr <- phis %>%
      group_by(feature) %>%
      # take square root of sum of squares
      summarise(global_phi = sqrt(mean(phi ^ 2)), .groups = "drop")
    shap_mat_sqr[r, "X1"] <- glob_sqr$global_phi[glob_sqr$feature == "X1"]
    shap_mat_sqr[r, "X2"] <- glob_sqr$global_phi[glob_sqr$feature == "X2"]
    
    glob_abs <- phis %>%
      group_by(feature) %>%
      # take square root of sum of squares
      summarise(global_phi = mean(abs(phi)), .groups = "drop")
    shap_mat_abs[r, "X1"] <- glob_abs$global_phi[glob_abs$feature == "X1"]
    shap_mat_abs[r, "X2"] <- glob_abs$global_phi[glob_abs$feature == "X2"]
  
    if (r %% 10 == 0) cat("Finished replicate", r, "\n")
  }
  
  t1 <- Sys.time()
  
  cat("Average time to explain:", (t1 - t0) / reps, "\n")
  
  list(
    best_params = best_params,
    tune_summary = tune_out,
    shapley_matrix_sqr = shap_mat_sqr,
    shapley_matrix_abs = shap_mat_abs
  )
}
```

```{r}
res <- experiment_5()
cat("For Average Absolute Value:", "\n")
cat("Mean of Importance of X1:", mean(res$shapley_matrix_abs[, "X1"]), "\n")
cat("Standard Deviation of Importance of X1:", sd(res$shapley_matrix_abs[, "X1"]), "\n")
cat("Mean of Importance of X2:", mean(res$shapley_matrix_abs[, "X2"]), "\n")
cat("Standard Deviation of Importance of X2:", sd(res$shapley_matrix_abs[, "X2"]), "\n")
cat("Mean of |X1 - X2|:", mean(abs(res$shapley_matrix_abs[, "X1"] - res$shapley_matrix_abs[, "X2"])), "\n")
cat("Standard Deviation of |X1 - X2|:", sd(abs(res$shapley_matrix_abs[, "X1"] - res$shapley_matrix_abs[, "X2"])), "\n")

cat("For Square Root of Sum of Squares:", "\n")
cat("Mean of Importance of X1:", mean(res$shapley_matrix_sqr[, "X1"]), "\n")
cat("Standard Deviation of Importance of X1:", sd(res$shapley_matrix_sqr[, "X1"]), "\n")
cat("Mean of Importance of X2:", mean(res$shapley_matrix_sqr[, "X2"]), "\n")
cat("Standard Deviation of Importance of X2:", sd(res$shapley_matrix_sqr[, "X2"]), "\n")
cat("Mean of |X1 - X2|:", mean(abs(res$shapley_matrix_sqr[, "X1"] - res$shapley_matrix_sqr[, "X2"])), "\n")
cat("Standard Deviation of |X1 - X2|:", sd(abs(res$shapley_matrix_sqr[, "X1"] - res$shapley_matrix_sqr[, "X2"])), "\n")
```
